element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic introduced immediately as primary interaction method
Enemy defeat pattern established early with low-threat enemies
Vertical and horizontal traversal using momentum; combines with arm mechanics
360-degree circular swinging with directional launch based on release timing
Reward for skilled momentum management; temporary invincibility state
Puzzle-solving and item collection integrated into arm mechanics
Optional challenge requiring exploration and timing-based obstacle courses
Scoring mechanic rewards altitude management during exit
Damage threshold system with extra life pickups and restorative items
Culmination of level mechanics against specialized opponents

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe platform after gap crossing
typical_tension_triggers: Approaching hazards and obstacles requiring navigation
Enemy encounters demanding precise arm-extension timing
Momentum-dependent platforming sections (pole swings, Star Handle launches)
Time-pressure in bonus stage obstacle courses
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate pace built on momentum management; tension escalates through precision-demanding traversal and combat encounters, relieved by successful mechanical execution and resource discovery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden bonus stage handles placed non-linearly within level layouts; require exploration and spatial awareness to locate
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden Star Handles grant access to optional bonus stages with time-limit obstacle courses; completion unlocks special codes post-game

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core arm mechanics on Planet Neer/Flora with manageable enemy patterns and safe traversal sections
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating pole-swing complexity, increased enemy density, and tighter momentum-based platforming requiring timing precision
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters against brainwashed planet leaders integrating all learned mechanics; high-pressure momentum and positioning demands
notable_spikes: Transition from basic arm usage to momentum-dependent Star Handle mechanics
Introduction of boss encounters requiring mastery of multiple mechanic combinations
Optional bonus stages with compressed time limits testing full mechanical proficiency

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal or vertical passages requiring extended arm grabbing and pulling mechanics to move between platforms or reach distant surfaces
Sequences of suspended pole-like structures requiring momentum-based swinging to traverse gaps or ascend/descend vertically
Dedicated zones with large Star Handles where players gain circular momentum, build to Meteor Strike state, and launch directionally for progression or scoring
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level conclusions and mid-level power sequences

notable_level_patterns.description: Boss fight stages featuring brainwashed planet leaders integrating arena movement, arm combat mechanics, and health management
Non-obvious hidden Star Handles providing one-time access to time-pressured obstacle course bonus stages with collectible rewards
